description:
Deploy four Maven artifact files from the Desktop to the 'example-repo-local' repository in Artifactory (http://localhost:8082, username 'admin', password 'password'). Each file must be placed at the following Maven GAV directory paths:

- commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar -> org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar
- commons-lang3-3.14.0.pom -> org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.pom
- commons-io-2.15.1.jar -> commons-io/commons-io/2.15.1/commons-io-2.15.1.jar
- commons-io-2.15.1.pom -> commons-io/commons-io/2.15.1/commons-io-2.15.1.pom
